languages.text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovers haughtily without uttering a word. It is clear he thinks you need no introduction.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}サーボ・スカル{/g}は、一言も発さずに、高慢そうに浮かんでいる。彼は、君に紹介する必要はないと思っているようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} hovers haughtily without uttering a word. It is clear he thinks you need no introduction.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}高傲地悬浮在空中，一言不发。很显然，它认为你不需要任何引见。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} se contente de flotter en gardant un silence dédaigneux. Manifestement, il estime qu'il est inutile de vous présenter.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} planea con arrogancia sin decir palabra. Es evidente que cree que no necesitas presentación.{/n}

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Hizmelet{/g}, tek bir kelime etmeden kibirle havada asılı duruyor. Takdime ihtiyacın olmadığını düşündüğü açık.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} schwebt überheblich neben dir, ohne ein Wort zu sagen. Er ist offenbar der Ansicht, dass du keine Einführung brauchst."{/n}
